title: esquizo.com
body: After neglecting it for months, I’ve started working on the mental health website [esquizo.com.](http://www.esquizo.com) again. I’ve realized that [Joomla](http://www.joomla.org) isn’t a silver bullet; it’s a bit outdated when it comes to things like CSS2, SEO, etc. But the good news is that it has a ton of plugins; I’ve installed the sef404 component, which creates SEO-friendly URLs in a simple way—I hope this improves the site’s search engine ranking. I’ve also reinstalled the MamBlog component so users can post content as if it were a blog. Too bad about the hosting—[Hostony](http://hostony.com/)—it’s very slow, sometimes frustrating. Sometimes I regret having migrated from **[Aruba.it](http://clk.tradedoubler.com/click?p=3296&a=503319&g=16421)**, which, despite being shoddy, was cheap and quite a bit faster.
